sourceDescription: 6 photos from Vinci's Google Drive archive folder 'Vinci / _Archive / Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed / Not yet processed / quiz 4' (folder ID 1xtWMTPSqdVrgR9nXza-PA6dpCFkwFt2o). A completed, handwritten 'Review Quiz #4' (Water Survival, SHLSOS Course #549), 24 fill-in-the-blank questions across 6 pages -- same format as the quiz-review-1 and quiz-3 batches.
sourceCitation: SHLSOS Course No. 549 Water Survival, Review Quiz #4 handout, (c) 2024 The Seafarers Harry Lundeberg School of Seamanship, Piney Point, MD 20674.
purpose: Traceability record for this raw image batch. Adding an entry here does NOT add it to any live question or draft pack. An image only reaches a student when a question in src/content/course.json explicitly sets its "image" field to this file's publicPath -- none of the questions drafted from this batch use an image, since the source is handwritten essay-style text with no diagrams.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 4
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #4', page 1 of 6 -- title page plus questions 1-4 (limit switch davit type, purpose of lifeboat gripes, sea painter setup, what prevents block rings from prematurely leaving the releasing hooks). Has decorative pencil doodles (crown/flame and bird/flower shapes) in the left margin -- purely decorative, don't overlap any question or answer text, no cleanup needed.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 4
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #4', page 2 of 6 -- questions 5-7 (frapping line setup in pitching/rolling seas, steps for lowering an open lifeboat, tricing pendant function). Small unrelated pencil doodle near Q5, doesn't overlap text.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 4
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #4', page 3 of 6 -- questions 8-11 (gravity davit speed-regulating equipment and max speed, ship positioning to pick up a lifeboat at sea, launch/recovery signal types, sea painter securing point with way on the ship). Clean page, no doodles.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 4
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #4', page 4 of 6 -- questions 12-15 (winch hand-crank precaution, item passed around fall wires before boarding [LEFT BLANK by student], most common lifeboat davit type, fall wire material properties). Clean page, no doodles.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 4
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #4', page 5 of 6 -- questions 16-20 (which davits require hand-cranking, safe launch procedure with way on the ship, limit switch function, one-person-operated davit type, minimum safety factor for launching gear). Clean page, no doodles.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 4
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #4', page 6 of 6 -- questions 21-24 (Rottmer releasing gear timing, compass error from onboard metal, magnetic compass stowage when not in use, source for required certified-lifeboatmen count). Clean page, no doodles. Question 24's answer ('SOLAS' / 'Station bill') conflicts with the already-live q-quiz1a-coi-lifeboatmen-source, whose correct answer is 'Certificate of Inspection' -- flagged in the source intake, not drafted as a new question.
